message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontName Courier New skinparam classFontSize 14 skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor #000000 skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8 skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000 skinparam classHeaderFontSize 16 skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000 skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000 skinparam classAttributeIconColor #FF0000 skinparam classMethodIconColor #00AA00 class "system" as C { + Admin admin + Book book + Reader reader + Lend_list lend_list -- + boolean lendBook(int bookId, int readerNumber) + boolean returnBook(int bookId, int readerNumber) + boolean addBook(Book book) + Book deleteBook(int bookId) + Book selectBook(int bookId) + boolean updateBook(Book book) } note top of C C end note @enduml
